name: 75.5"x29.5" Span 3-Head Metal Globe Floor Lamp Brass - Threshold™
description:
Add a stylish lighting accent to your home with the Span 3-Head Metal Globe Floor Lamp from Threshold™. This brass-finish floor lamp features three globe-shape shades with a round white base for a modern look that will suit a variety of decor aesthetics. Made from metal, this floor lamp lights up with an electrical outlet to fill any space with a warm glow.

Threshold™: Looks like home, feels like you.
